__about: Map of ticker -> IR press-release RSS URL. Used by --check-announcements to auto-upgrade estimated events to confirmed when a company publishes its earnings-date press release. Populate for Tier 1 tickers you care about; tickers without a config are silently skipped.
__tips: Many companies use Q4 Inc or Notified.com as their IR vendor; URLs look like https://{company}.q4cdn.com/rss or https://www.notified.com/rss/{id}
Press-release only feeds (not all newsroom items) give cleaner signal — look for 'press releases' or 'news releases' RSS specifically
